subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath chosen through His grace and bounty! Another letter was sent but was lost along the way [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اختاره الله بفضله و جوده نامه دیگر ارسال شد ولی در راه مفقود گردید هر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @education of children; moral education
